design_philosophy.archetype: Organic & Earthy (Trust) mixed with Vibrant Utility
principles: Fusion: Utility apps don't have to be boring. Mix 'Swiss Grid' precision with 'Organic' warmth.
Emotion: Relief. The user is stressed; the design must say 'We got this'.
Content: Service first. Show the help, not just text.
Zoom: Close-ups of hands working, tools, happy faces.

layout_strategies.dashboard: High Density Grid (Mode B) - Sidebar nav, dense data tables, minimal cards.
layout_strategies.auth: Split Screen - Brand visual on left, clean form on right.

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-semibold shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 bg-white border border-stone-200 hover:bg-stone-50 transition-all

cards.default: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-stone-100 shadow-sm p-8 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden bg-white rounded-3xl border border-stone-200 p-8 hover:border-orange-200 transition-all cursor-pointer
cards.dashboard: bg-white rounded-xl border border-stone-200 shadow-sm p-6

inputs.default: h-12 bg-stone-50 border-transparent focus:border-orange-500 focus:bg-white rounded-xl transition-all

visual_enhancers.textures: Add a subtle 'noise' overlay opacity-5 to backgrounds to remove digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Use 'layered' shadows: shadow-sm for depth, shadow-xl for floating elements.
visual_enhancers.border_radius: Use rounded-3xl for large containers, rounded-xl for inner elements (Nested Radii Rule).

icons.styles: Stroke width 1.5px, rounded caps. Color: Text-Foreground or Primary.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use standard HTML select/input. Use Shadcn Select/Input.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use Clash Display.
Do NOT center text by default. Use grid layouts.
Do NOT use generic gradients. Use solid colors + texture.
ALWAYS add data-testid to interactive elements.

setup: Install dependencies: lucide-react, framer-motion, clsx, tailwind-merge, @radix-ui/react-*, sonner
Configure Tailwind theme with the provided colors and font families.
implementation_order: 2. Build UI Primitives (Buttons, Inputs, Cards) customized to guidelines
3. Layout Landing Page (Hero, Services Grid, CTA)
6. Build Admin Dashboard (Sidebar, Data Tables, Stats)
